name: Stone
description: A common solid block found underground. Mined fastest with a pickaxe. Drops cobblestone unless mined with Silk Touch.

name: Cobblestone
description: Dropped when mining stone without Silk Touch. Used for tools, furnaces, and building.

name: Granite
description: An igneous rock variant of stone. Can be polished for decorative building.

name: Diorite
description: A white stone variant. Can be polished for decorative use.

name: Andesite
description: A gray stone variant. Can be polished for decorative building.

name: Tuff
description: A light gray rock found near deepslate. Used for decorative building.

name: Calcite
description: A white mineral block found in geode layers. Used for decorative building.

name: Deepslate
description: A dark stone variant found deep underground. Harder than stone and used for building.

name: Cobbled Deepslate
description: Drops from mining deepslate. Used for tools and building.

name: Reinforced Deepslate
description: Indestructible block found in the deep dark near the warden. Cannot be mined.

name: Bedrock
description: An indestructible block found at the bottom of the world and in the End and Nether roofs.

name: Dirt
description: A common surface block. Can be tilled into farmland with a hoe.

name: Grass Block
description: Dirt covered in grass. Common in the Overworld surface. Can be silk-touched.

name: Mycelium
description: Dirt covered in fungus. Found in mushroom fields. Great for growing mushrooms.

name: Podzol
description: Dirt covered in pine needles. Found in old-growth taiga.

name: Coarse Dirt
description: Dirt that cannot be tilled. Crafted from dirt and gravel.

name: Rooted Dirt
description: Dirt with roots under azalea trees. Can be converted to dirt.

name: Mud
description: Found in mangrove swamps. Can be packed into mud bricks or combined with wheat into packed mud.

name: Clay
description: Found underwater in rivers and lakes. Smelt into bricks or terracotta.

name: Terracotta
description: A hardened clay block found in Badlands. Can be dyed into colored variants.

name: White Terracotta
description: Dyed terracotta. Used for decorative building.

name: Iron Ore
description: Iron ore is found underground, usually between Y=-64 and Y=72. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Smelt it to get iron ingots.

name: Deepslate Iron Ore
description: Iron ore embedded in deepslate. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Drops iron ore.

name: Gold Ore
description: Gold ore found around Y=-16 and abundantly in Badlands. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Deepslate Gold Ore
description: Gold ore embedded in deepslate. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Diamond Ore
description: Diamond ore is found deep underground, most commonly around Y=-59. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Deepslate Diamond Ore
description: Diamond ore embedded in deepslate. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Coal Ore
description: Coal ore is common underground and in mountains. Mined with any pickaxe. Drops coal for torches and fuel.

name: Deepslate Coal Ore
description: Coal ore embedded in deepslate. Mined with any pickaxe.

name: Redstone Ore
description: Redstone ore is found deep underground. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops redstone dust.

name: Deepslate Redstone Ore
description: Redstone ore embedded in deepslate.

name: Lapis Lazuli Ore
description: Lapis ore is found underground. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Drops lapis lazuli.

name: Deepslate Lapis Ore
description: Lapis ore embedded in deepslate.

name: Copper Ore
description: Copper ore generates in larger ore blobs underground. Requires a stone pickaxe or better.

name: Deepslate Copper Ore
description: Copper ore embedded in deepslate.

name: Emerald Ore
description: Emerald ore is found in mountain biomes. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Deepslate Emerald Ore
description: Emerald ore embedded in deepslate.

name: Nether Gold Ore
description: Gold ore found in the Nether. Drops gold nuggets when mined.

name: Nether Quartz Ore
description: Quartz ore found in the Nether. Drops nether quartz.

name: Ancient Debris
description: Rare ore found deep in the Nether. Smelted into netherite scrap. Blast-resistant.

name: Block of Raw Iron
description: A compact block of raw iron. Can be smelted directly.

name: Block of Raw Gold
description: A compact block of raw gold.

name: Block of Raw Copper
description: A compact block of raw copper.

name: Obsidian
description: Created when water touches a lava source. Requires a diamond or netherite pickaxe. Used for nether portals and enchanting tables.

name: Crying Obsidian
description: A decorative obsidian variant that emits purple particles. Used to craft respawn anchors.

name: Glowstone
description: A bright light source found in the Nether. Drops glowstone dust.

name: Shroomlight
description: A light-emitting block found in nether forests.

name: Ochre Froglight
description: A warm yellow light block dropped by frogs eating small magma cubes.

name: Verdant Froglight
description: A green light block dropped by frogs eating small magma cubes.

name: Pearlescent Froglight
description: A purple light block dropped by frogs eating small magma cubes.

name: Crafting Table
description: Expands the crafting grid to 3x3. Crafted from 4 wooden planks.

name: Furnace
description: Smelts ores, food, and other items using fuel. Crafted from 8 cobblestone.

name: Blast Furnace
description: Smelts ores and metal items twice as fast as a furnace.

name: Smoker
description: Cooks food twice as fast as a furnace. Crafted from a furnace and logs.

name: Chest
description: Stores up to 27 stacks of items. Crafted from 8 wooden planks.

name: Trapped Chest
description: A chest that emits a redstone signal when opened.

name: Ender Chest
description: A chest whose contents are shared across all ender chests.

name: Barrel
description: A storage block that can be opened even when blocks are placed on top.

name: Enchanting Table
description: Used to enchant tools, weapons, and armor.

name: Anvil
description: Used to repair, rename, and combine enchanted items.

name: Grindstone
description: Used to repair tools or remove enchantments. Returns some experience.

name: Stonecutter
description: Cuts stone blocks into slabs and stairs more efficiently.

name: Loom
description: Used to apply patterns to banners.

name: Smithing Table
description: Used to upgrade diamond gear to netherite.

name: Cartography Table
description: Used to clone, expand, and lock maps.

name: Composter
description: Converts crops and plants into bone meal.

name: Lectern
description: Holds books for multiple players to read. Emits a redstone signal.

name: Torch
description: Provides light. Crafted from coal and a stick.

name: Soul Torch
description: A blue torch emitting less light.

name: Lantern
description: A brighter light source than a torch.

name: Soul Lantern
description: A blue lantern variant.

name: Jack o'Lantern
description: A carved pumpkin with a torch inside.

name: Sea Lantern
description: A bright underwater light source.

name: Redstone Lamp
description: A lamp that lights up when powered by redstone.

name: Oak Log
description: Wood from oak trees. Can be crafted into planks and sticks.

name: Spruce Log
description: Wood from spruce trees.

name: Birch Log
description: Light-colored wood from birch trees.

name: Jungle Log
description: Wood from jungle trees.

name: Acacia Log
description: Wood from acacia trees. Crafted into reddish planks.

name: Dark Oak Log
description: Wood from dark oak trees.

name: Mangrove Log
description: Wood from mangrove trees.

name: Cherry Log
description: Pink-tinted wood from cherry trees.

name: Crimson Stem
description: The wood of crimson fungi in the Nether. Not flammable.

name: Warped Stem
description: The wood of warped fungi in the Nether. Not flammable.

name: Oak Planks
description: Basic wooden planks. Used for crafting, sticks, and building.

name: Glass
description: Transparent block made by smelting sand.

name: Glass Pane
description: Thin glass that connects to adjacent panes.

name: White Stained Glass
description: Colored glass.

name: Sand
description: A gravity-affected block found in deserts and beaches. Smelt into glass.

name: Red Sand
description: A red variant of sand found in Badlands biomes.

name: Suspicious Sand
description: Sand containing buried treasure.

name: Suspicious Gravel
description: Gravel containing buried treasure.

name: Gravel
description: A gravity-affected block. Drops flint occasionally.

name: Snow
description: A thin layer of snow on the ground.

name: Snow Block
description: A full block of snow.

name: Ice
description: Slippery block that melts in light.

name: Packed Ice
description: Solid ice block that does not melt.

name: Blue Ice
description: Very dense ice for fast boat travel.

name: Netherrack
description: The main stone of the Nether. Burns indefinitely when lit.

name: Soul Sand
description: Slows movement. Used for nether wart farms and soul fire.

name: Soul Soil
description: Found in soul sand valleys. Used to create soul fire.

name: Blackstone
description: A dark stone found in Bastion Remnants. Can substitute stone in recipes.

name: Gilded Blackstone
description: Blackstone that may drop gold nuggets when mined.

name: Basalt
description: A dark pillar-like block found in the Nether.

name: Smooth Basalt
description: Polished basalt.

name: Polished Blackstone
description: The polished form of blackstone.

name: End Stone
description: The main block of the End islands.

name: End Stone Bricks
description: A decorative variant of end stone.

name: Purpur Block
description: A decorative block from End cities.

name: Purpur Pillar
description: A pillar variant of purpur.

name: Prismarine
description: A sea-themed block found in ocean monuments.

name: Prismarine Bricks
description: A brick variant of prismarine.

name: Dark Prismarine
description: A dark variant of prismarine.

name: Sponge
description: Absorbs water in a 7-block radius.

name: Wet Sponge
description: A waterlogged sponge. Dry in a furnace.

name: Melon
description: Grows from melon seeds.

name: Pumpkin
description: Grows from pumpkin seeds.

name: Carved Pumpkin
description: A pumpkin with a face.

name: Hay Bale
description: A compact block of wheat.

name: Dried Kelp Block
description: A fuel block.

name: Honey Block
description: A sticky block that slows movement.

name: Honeycomb Block
description: A decorative block crafted from honeycombs.

name: Beehive
description: A home for bees.

name: Bee Nest
description: A naturally generated bee home.

name: Cactus
description: A desert plant that damages on contact.

name: Sugar Cane
description: Grows near water.

name: Bamboo
description: Fast-growing plant.

name: Vines
description: Climbable vines found in jungles and swamps.

name: Twisting Vines
description: Climbable vines in warped forests.

name: Weeping Vines
description: Vines from crimson forests.

name: Sculk
description: A block that spreads by consuming experience.

name: Sculk Catalyst
description: A sculk block that spreads when a mob dies nearby.

name: Sculk Shrieker
description: Summons the warden when triggered.

name: Sculk Sensor
description: A redstone component that detects vibrations.

name: Calibrated Sculk Sensor
description: A sculk sensor that filters specific vibration frequencies.

name: White Wool
description: Dropped from sheep or crafted from string.

name: Bookshelf
description: Bookshelves around an enchanting table improve enchantment levels.
